blended.narrative: Steamboat is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,763 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 59".
